top_pick.name: Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival
top_pick.why: This FREE festival at Seattle Center is the perfect spring weekend activity. Celebrating Seattle's friendship with Japan and the gift of 1000 cherry trees from 1976, it offers a rich cultural experience with traditional Japanese art, dance, music, martial arts demonstrations, and delicious food. The timing coincides with peak cherry blossom season, making it a visually stunning and culturally enriching way to spend a Sunday. Great for all ages and budgets!
